title: Form Array by Concatenating Subarrays of Another Array
titleCn: 通过连接另一个数组的子数组得到一个数组

testcases.input: groups = [[1,-1,-1],[3,-2,0]], nums = [1,-1,0,1,-1,-1,3,-2,0] Output: true Explanation: You can choose the 0th subarray as [1,-1,0,1,-1,-1,3,-2,0] and the 1st one as [1,-1,0,1,-1,-1,3,-2,0]. These subarrays are disjoint as they share no common nums[k] element.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: You can choose the 0th subarray as [1,-1,0,1,-1,-1,3,-2,0] and the 1st one as [1,-1,0,1,-1,-1,3,-2,0]. These subarrays are disjoint as they share no common nums[k] element.

testcases.input: groups = [[10,-2],[1,2,3,4]], nums = [1,2,3,4,10,-2] Output: false Explanation: Note that choosing the subarrays [1,2,3,4,10,-2] and [1,2,3,4,10,-2] is incorrect because they are not in the same order as in groups. [10,-2] must come before [1,2,3,4].
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: Note that choosing the subarrays [1,2,3,4,10,-2] and [1,2,3,4,10,-2] is incorrect because they are not in the same order as in groups. [10,-2] must come before [1,2,3,4].

testcases.input: groups = [[1,2,3],[3,4]], nums = [7,7,1,2,3,4,7,7] Output: false Explanation: Note that choosing the subarrays [7,7,1,2,3,4,7,7] and [7,7,1,2,3,4,7,7] is invalid because they are not disjoint. They share a common elements nums[4] (0-indexed).
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: Note that choosing the subarrays [7,7,1,2,3,4,7,7] and [7,7,1,2,3,4,7,7] is invalid because they are not disjoint. They share a common elements nums[4] (0-indexed).
